_doc.descricao: Curvas de depreciacao economica/comercial por categoria de device.
_doc.uso: Usada EXCLUSIVAMENTE para calcular o valor de venda final do ativo (M5). NAO usada para default.
_doc.separacao: Este arquivo trata apenas de valor de mercado/revenda. Para depreciacao contabil, ver dep_contabil.json.

iphone.description: iPhone — curva exponencial 27% a.a. Reten ~73% apos 12m, ~53% apos 24m, ~39% apos 36m. Floor: 30%.

notebook_windows.description: Notebook Windows — curva exponencial 33% a.a. Floor: 15%.

console.description: Console — curva stepped: 80%/70%/60%/50% nos checkpoints 12/24/36/48m. Floor: 15%.

apple_watch.description: Apple Watch — curva stepped: 80%/70%/60%/50% nos checkpoints 12/24/36/48m. Floor: 15%.

default.description: Padrao — curva stepped: 80%/70%/60%/50% nos checkpoints 12/24/36/48m. Floor: 20%.
